sourcePolicy: Documentation, reasoning, browser evidence, semantic code navigation, and reviewed local codebase graph read tools can run with approved read-heavy defaults. Authenticated account, database, production, broad filesystem, destructive, mutating, and secret-bearing tools stay disabled or prompt-gated. Each server records sourceUrl, risk, auth, approval, and why it is enabled or disabled.

servers.name: openaiDeveloperDocs
servers.setupHint: No credential or extra input is required.

servers.name: context7
servers.setupHint: Requires npm/npx network access on first startup; no credential is required.
servers.defaultReason: Documentation lookup only; no project mutation.

servers.name: sequential-thinking
servers.setupHint: Requires npm/npx network access on first startup; no credential is required.
servers.defaultReason: No-auth reasoning helper with no project mutation.

servers.name: playwright
servers.setupHint: Requires npm/npx network access and local browser control; no credential is required.
servers.defaultReason: Useful for UI evidence; only read/navigation evidence tools are allowlisted and interaction tools stay prompt-gated.

servers.name: chrome-devtools
servers.setupHint: Requires npm/npx network access and starts an isolated Chrome/DevTools bridge; no credential is required.
servers.defaultReason: Browser inspection with isolated mode and redacted headers; only read/navigation evidence tools are allowlisted.
servers.notes: Chrome inspection with isolated mode and redacted network headers.

servers.name: serena
servers.setupHint: Requires uvx and the pinned Serena git source; disable if uvx is unavailable.
servers.defaultReason: Semantic local code navigation; only read/navigation tools are allowlisted and symbol edits stay prompt-gated.
servers.notes: Semantic code navigation. Disable if uvx is unavailable.

servers.name: memory
servers.setupHint: No credential is required; use only for non-secret local memory.
servers.defaultReason: Local memory can be useful but must not store secrets.
servers.notes: Local memory graph. Do not store secrets.

servers.name: codebase-memory
servers.setupHint: Requires Node/npx first-run package download; keeps local repository graph state on this machine. Indexing, destructive graph, and admin tools stay prompt-gated or disabled.
servers.defaultReason: Local codebase graph reads are allowlisted, while indexing and destructive/admin tools are disabled or prompt-gated.
servers.notes: Local codebase knowledge graph. Keep generated graph artifacts out of source unless deliberately reviewed.

servers.name: filesystem
servers.setupHint: Choose a deliberate local root path in config args before enabling.
servers.defaultReason: Disabled because broad filesystem access is too powerful for a starter default.
servers.notes: Enable only for intentional local paths.

servers.name: github
servers.setupHint: Requires GitHub/Copilot account authorization; keep disabled until private GitHub context is needed.
servers.defaultReason: Disabled because it requires account authorization; configured readonly endpoint may be approved after deliberate enablement.
servers.notes: Repository and PR context. Keep disabled until needed.

servers.name: figma
servers.setupHint: Requires Figma account or workspace authorization.
servers.defaultReason: Disabled because it requires private design-account authorization.
servers.notes: Design context. Requires user or workspace auth.

servers.name: linear
servers.defaultReason: Disabled because it can expose private issue/project data.

servers.name: notion
servers.defaultReason: Disabled because it can expose private workspace docs and databases.

servers.name: sentry
servers.setupHint: Requires Sentry organization authorization and may expose production error data.
servers.defaultReason: Disabled because it can expose production error data.

servers.name: vercel
servers.setupHint: Requires Vercel account/team authorization and may expose project or deployment data.
servers.defaultReason: Disabled because it can expose project and deployment data.

servers.name: supabase
servers.setupHint: Set SUPABASE_DB_URL in the shell environment, then add a task-specific local launcher only after explicit database approval; never commit the value.
servers.defaultReason: Disabled because database access must be task-specific and explicit.
servers.notes: Database access. Enable only with explicit task need; keep the DB URL out of committed launcher args.
